title: Squirrel Removal West Orange, NJ | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in West Orange, NJ. Safe, humane extraction & exclusion from attics, walls & chimneys. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with squirrels in your West Orange home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout West Orange, New Jersey, protecting your property from these persistent invaders. Our experienced team uses humane, effective methods to remove squirrels and prevent their return, with pricing typically ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving West Orange and surrounding Essex County communities with reliable, humane squirrel removal solutions. Our licensed technicians provide thorough inspections, safe removal, complete exclusion work, and damage repair to ensure your property remains squirrel-free.
localContext: West Orange's tree-lined neighborhoods, historic homes near Llewellyn Park, and properties surrounding the South Mountain Reservation provide ideal habitats for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces. The area's mature oak and maple trees mean squirrels are particularly active here, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your Tudor-style homes and colonial residences from wildlife intrusion.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in West Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in West Orange typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on factors like the number of squirrels, entry points, extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my West Orange home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes near rooflines, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. West Orange's older homes are particularly susceptible to squirrel entry through deteriorated soffits and roof vents.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in West Orange?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical removal methods compliant with New Jersey wildlife regulations. We use live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors, and never separate mothers from dependent young. All squirrels are handled according to state guidelines for wildlife management.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my West Orange property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for West Orange residents in most cases. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We'll seal all entry points and provide exclusion services to prevent future problems, ensuring long-term protection for your home.
